name: Kasten
description: Kasten — Kubernetes-native backup and disaster recovery platform with application-consistent snapshots.

seo.title: Kasten — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Kasten: Kasten — Kubernetes-native backup and disaster recovery platform with application-consistent snapshots.

when_to_use: Disaster recovery for stateful Kubernetes workloads
Cross-cluster migration of Kubernetes apps and PVCs
Policy-driven automated backups for K8s namespaces
RBAC-governed data protection for multi-tenant Kubernetes

review.verdict: The mature pick for Kubernetes DR when downtime and data loss are existential risks.
review.best_for: Enterprises running stateful Kubernetes workloads with strict RPO and RTO requirements
review.not_for: Small teams, stateless apps, or budget-conscious startups
